title: Sea Shanty Discs
description: A mod adding sea shanty music discs.
body:
This mod adds fifteen new music discs for all your sea shanty needs. These can be found through the following methods:

**Shipwreck treasure chests**

![Discs found in shipwrecks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0b0efecde0490774a4c8219f02f6c297578fd7a.png)

- Barrett's Privateers, by Stan Rogers
- Bones in the Ocean, by The Longest Johns
- Leave Her Johnny, by Michiel Schrey, Seán Dagher and Nils Brown
- Rye Whiskey, by The Pirates Charles

**Buried treasures**

![Discs found in buried treasures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2be47671e9db78eae45f6c7273fa22bdd999f413.png)

- A Drop of Nelson's Blood, by The Longest Johns
- Captain Kidd, by Great Big Sea
- Randy Dandy-O, by The Longest Johns
- Santiana, by The Longest Johns

**Ocean ruin chests**

![Discs found in ocean ruins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9775aa68504c5755862c96764111befa40d79eb.png)

- Here's a Health to the Company, by Colm R. McGuinness
- Rolling Down to Old Maui, by Stan Rogers
- Spanish Ladies, by Jerry Bryant and Starboard Mess

**Fishing**

![Discs found by fishing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b88cad7fe843eb55db1269b14c7124759b42b180.png)

- Drunken Sailor, by The Irish Rovers
- Fish in the Sea, by Michiel Schrey, Seán Dagher and Nils Brown

**Trading with expert (level 4) fishermen**

![Discs found through trading](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49888cd2a5dca5224f50c0e156e21463a626972b.png)

- Retirement Song, by The Longest Johns
- Wellerman, by Nathan Evans

All of the music belongs to their respective artists and copyright owners.

**Available in**: English, Portuguese, and Pirate Speak.

**Suggested mod**: If you want to sail the seven seas while still being able to enjoy yourself, checkout the mod [JukeboxBoat, by KaseToatz](https://modrinth.com/project/sZwQVMGk)!
